name: Achievements
author: bubblemoth
description: A Navidrome plugin that tracks listening statistics and unlocks achievements as you listen.

log_unlocks.title: Log achievement unlocks to the Navidrome server log

users.reason: Receive scrobble events for assigned users and track per-user achievement progress

kvstore.reason: Persist user's listening stats and unlocked achievements across restarts

subsonicapi.reason: Create/update a per-user "Achievements" playlist to display unlocked achievements
